name: Should display sampling chip when using sampled cohort in analysis

steps.name: Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772803991807 substantiate-e2e' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Click getByTestId('modal-dialog').locator('div').locator('span[data-test-element^="item-name-"]').getByText('1772804045975 Sampled - Descriptive Cohort (Patients)', { exact: true }).first()
Fill "1772804319841 Sampled Cohort Analysis - 1772804045975 Sampled - Descriptive Cohort (Patients)" getByTestId('tree-search')

Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804319841 Sampled Cohort Analysis - 1772804045975 Sampled - Descriptive Cohort (Patients)' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))

expect analysis to be generated getByTestId(/level-0$/).filter({ hasText: '1772804319841 Sampled Cohort Analysis - 1772804045975 Sampled - Descriptive Cohort (Patients)' }).filter({ has: getByTestId(/^item-executed/) }).first()
